description: Composition Grey melange jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs that has navy and white stripes, navy and white panel detailing around the armholes, hood with drawstring, zippered front placket, patch pockets on either sides of the zipper placket, appliqued helmet and embroidered lettering on the upper left chest, distressed look numbering on the back and ribbed hemline with navy and white stripes Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang to dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print or embroidery The appliqued elements on the chest and printed numbering on the back in classic colours add rugged styling to this hooded jacket from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans, tees and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
